a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: Page content is explicitly system-wide ('Memorial Healthcare System', multi-hospital travel). sourceScope should be HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL, not UNKNOWN_SCOPE; PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE attribution to the Hollywood campus requires a separate campusApplicabilityProof.

This is an affiliated-school routing instruction (FAU/FIU go through their school), not a NEGATIVE_AFFILIATED_ONLY refusal — the very next sentence opens VSLO to other visiting students. NEGATIVE_AFFILIATED_ONLY overstates the refusal.
The multi-hospital travel quote is itself the strongest evidence the policy is system-wide; consider attaching it as a scope-conflict signal rather than a campus-specific claim.

No coordinator contact email or phone present.
Specialty list beyond Emergency Medicine (which provides SLOEs) is not enumerated.
Application deadline / timing windows not stated.

Re-evaluate c2 (NEGATIVE_AFFILIATED_ONLY) — the sentence is a routing carveout for FAU/FIU, not a refusal to other visiting students.
Verify no PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE PUBLIC visibility is assigned given LCME/COCA-only eligibility excludes IMG visiting students.
